name: Betty Carter's Quick Corn Bread
recipeInstructions:
1. Preheat the oven to 400°F.
2. Place the butter in a heavy, 4-cup baking dish and place it in the preheated oven.
3. Combine the cornmeal, salt, and baking soda. Beat the egg until blended and stir into the buttermilk. Pour over the dry ingredients and stir only until blended.
4. Remove the pan from the oven and tilt to distribute the butter evenly. Pour the batter immediately into the hot pan and return it to the heated oven. Bake until firm and lightly browned, 20-25 minutes.
5. Serve hot with lots of soft butter and jam.
